topic: Scientists discover a surprising way to quiet the anxious mi.

framework.structure: [Authority] + ['has known this for decades'] + [Why it was suppressed] + [What it means for you now]
framework.trigger: Conspiracy of suppression — powerful people deliberately kept this from you
framework.example: Psychologists have known this negotiation trick for 40 years. It was never taught in schools because it is too effective.

script.hook: Psychologists have known this negotiation trick for 40 years. It was never taught in schools because it is too effective.
script.body: This psychological mechanism gives an unfair advantage in every conversation.
